sections.sectionTitle: Galte kiang pan Hot ding Ngetna

verses.text: Topa aw, kei hong langpangte langpang in la, kei hong dote do in
Lum lian leh lum neu la in la, keimah hong huh in
Teipi leh teitangzang dok in la, kei hong delhte' lam ngat in! Keima tungah, “Nang a hong honpa ka hi,” hong ci in
Kei hong sawmte mai zumin mindaisak ta in! Keima siatna ding a bawlte nungkik sakin sisak in
Topa' vantung mi' hawlna tawh huih letkhiat ansite tawh amaute kibangsak in
Topa' vantung mi' delhna-ah a taina lampi uh mialin nalsak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thu omlopi-in a ngenthang uh tawh kei hong siah uh a, thu omlopi-in gum to-in kei hong siah uh hi
A phawkloh kalun amaute' tungah siatna tungsak in! Amau' ngenthang mahah amaute mah awksak in la, a kisiamang khin dingin amaute puksak in
Tua ciangin Topa tungah ka lungdam mahmah ding a, ama hotkhiatna-ah nuamin ka diang ding hi
Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh, “ Topa aw, ama-a' dingin a hatluate kiang panin a thahatlo mi a honkhia, a bawlsiate' kiang panin mizawngte a honkhia, nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam?” ka ci ding hi
Mi a el tecite hong kipan uh a, ka theihloh thute kei hong dong uh hi
Amaute in ka hoihnate siatna tawh hong thuk uh a, ka khawngai mahmah hi
Ahih hangin kei ahih leh, amaute a cinat uh ciangin, puanhampi silhin an tangin kei ka kigimtawm sak hi
Ka lawm, ka sanggampa hangin a dah bangin ka dah hi. A nu' hanga a kap mi bangin kapin ka vak kawikawi a, kunin ka kidikdik hi
Ahih hangin kei ka tukna-ah amaute nuamin kikhawm uh a, keimah a langpangin kikaikhawm uh hi. Ka theih ngei hetloh khebaite nangawn in tawlnga hetloin kei hong gensia niloh uh hi
Zahtakna mel nei hetloin kei hong zahko niloh uh a, a ha uh hong gawisan uh hi
Topa aw, bang tanvei hong enkhong ding na hi hiam? Amau' hong sukgawpna panin keimah hong honkhia in la, humpinelkaite kiang panin kei hong hon in
Tua ciangin mihon kikhopna lian sungah nangma tungah lungdamna ka hong ko ding a, mihonpite lak panin nang ka hong phat ding hi
A manlopi-a ka gal a hite kei tungah lungdamsak kei in la, thu omlopi-a kei hong mudahte, mitheek kipiasak kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kilemna thu genlo uh a, daitakin a om mite langpangin, khemna thu ngaihsun uh hi
Amaute in kei hong kamkat beba uh a, amaute in, “Ha, Ha! Mu khin hang ei!” ci uh hi
Topa aw, na mu khin hi; dai ommawk ke'n! Topa aw, kei kiang panin gamla om ke'n
Ka Topa, ka Pasian aw, ka thu hong thei in la, kei-a' dingin nangmah hong kisosuah tawm in
Ka Topa, ka Pasian aw, na thumanna tawh a kituakin keima thutan'na hong langsak in la, keima gimna-ah amaute lungdamsak ke'n
Amau leh amau tungah, “Ha, i tuptup tung ei!” kicisak kei in. “Amah nawmvalhtum khin hang,” amaute cisak kei in
Kei' kamsiatna-ah a lungdamte maizumsak in la, zahhuaigawp sak in! Kei tungah a hong kiliansakte maizumna leh mindaina thuaksak in
Kei thutang ka hihna lahkhiat ding a deihte lungdamin awngin, kipaksak in la, “A nasempa' hoihna-ah a lungkim Topa lian hi,” cici sak in
Tua ciangin na thumanna leh nangmah phatna sunthapai-in ka gengen ding hi.
